Aphex - multiplayer scheduling with loose LPS support - strong in UK/European infrastructure - no native PPC - no structured constraint workflow
Visilean - LPS + Lean-BIM integrated platform - strong in data centres and global markets - has commissioning checklists for data centres - strong field mobile app
Outbuild - LPS-native scheduling - strong in North America - native PPC and analytics - deep Procore and Autodesk integration - no spatial view
Visilean has commissioning checklists specifically for data centre projects - this is the only competitor with commissioning-specific functionality
Uconia has a commissioning solution planned with rule builder for sub task generation - this would be a differentiator vs Aphex and Outbuild in the data centre GC segment
